hero.eyebrow: Visual feedback platform for 3D, PDF and images
hero.title: Design feedback in context, not in emails
hero.subtitle: Share a STEP file, PDF or image via link. Your client pins a comment on the exact spot. No CAD license, no reviewer accounts needed.
hero.ctaMicro: No credit card required · Sign up in 5 seconds

step.title: 3D Models (STEP)
step.description: Browse CAD models directly in the browser. No installation, no plugins.

pdf.title: PDF Documents
pdf.description: Multi-page PDFs with page navigation and annotation pins anywhere.

image.title: Images
image.description: Renders, photos, sketches — up to 20 files in a single review with gallery navigation.

step1.title: Upload a file
step1.description: Drag and drop a file into your project. Automatic type detection — STEP, PDF, or image.

step2.title: Share a link
step2.description: Copy a link with one click. Set a password, expiration date, and access level.

step3.title: Collect feedback
step3.description: Reviewer clicks on a specific spot, places a pin, and writes a comment. Everything in one place.

pins.title: Pins with comments
pins.description: Point to the exact spot on a model, PDF page, or image. Each pin has a comment thread.

sharing.title: Link sharing
sharing.description: Password, expiration, access control — Viewer or Commenter. Email invitations.

realtime.title: Real-time
realtime.description: Comments appear instantly via WebSocket. No page refresh needed.

orgs.title: Organizations & projects
orgs.description: Group reviews into projects, manage your team, and control access. Each member sees only what they should.

browser.title: No installation
browser.description: Everything works in the browser — including 3D models. Just a link.

security.title: Security
security.description: Encrypted passwords, expiring links, data isolation between organizations.

midCta.ctaMicro: No credit card required · Sign up in 5 seconds

teams.title: Companies and teams
items: Design studios sending projects for client approval
Creative agencies collecting feedback on renders
Teams organizing reviews into per-client projects

freelancers.title: Freelancers and small businesses
items: Designers needing a quick OK from a client
...even for a husband who doesn't know where to hang a painting

security.title: Your data is safe
security.subtitle: Security is built into every layer of the application — from file storage to access control.

encryption.title: Encrypted connections
encryption.description: All communication happens over HTTPS/TLS. Files are encrypted AES-256 at rest on Cloudflare R2.

passwords.title: Hashed passwords
passwords.description: User and share link passwords are hashed with bcrypt — never stored in plain text.

expiration.title: Expiring links
expiration.description: Set an expiration date for share links — access is automatically blocked after it passes.

isolation.title: Data isolation
isolation.description: Each organization's data is completely isolated. No access to other organizations' reviews.

access.title: Access control
access.description: Precise access levels — Viewer (view only) or Commenter (view + comments).

auth.title: Authorization at every step
auth.description: Every API request verifies session, organization membership, and permissions for the specific review.

noAi.title: Your files don't train AI
noAi.description: We never use uploaded files to train AI models. Your intellectual property remains yours alone.

finalCta.title: Start collecting feedback in 30 seconds
finalCta.subtitle: No credit card. No commitment.
finalCta.ctaMicro: No credit card · Sign up with Google in 5 seconds
